_comment: TEMPLATE only — copy to config.local.json (gitignored). Never put real secrets in THIS file. Never commit config.local.json.
_security: account / verifyToken / accessKey → config.local.json only. ui labels → ui.local.json only. Both must stay gitignored.
_step1_account: Fill in config.local.json: account identifier used on SSO account panel (required).
_step2_verifyToken: Fill in config.local.json: verify token after account step (required; test env often fixed).
_step3_accessKey: Fill in config.local.json: access key after org pick (required). Shown as password input.
_step0_entryUrl: SSO entry URL. User-pasted URL overrides via --entry-url. Default is EMC test entry.
_step3a_org: Org list <dd> visible text after verifyToken.
_step5_role: Identity label after backend tab. Use 版块 not 板块.
